mapper.select: SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, transaction_id, payment_amount, payment_time, accounting_time, payment_method, payment_source, status, reference_number, notes, operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, transaction_id, payment_amount, payment_time, accounting_time, payment_method, payment_source, status, reference_number, notes, operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE loan_account_id = #{loanAccountId} ORDER BY payment_time DESC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, transaction_id, payment_amount, payment_time, accounting_time, payment_method, payment_source, status, reference_number, notes, operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE contract_number = #{contractNumber} ORDER BY payment_time DESC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, transaction_id, payment_amount, payment_time, accounting_time, payment_method, payment_source, status, reference_number, notes, operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY payment_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET accounting_time = #{accountingTime}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
